scripts.build: bun run build:cli && bun run build:docs
scripts.build:docs: node --require ./scripts/css-hook.cjs --import "data:text/javascript,import { register } from \"node:module\"; import { pathToFileURL } from \"node:url\"; register(\"./scripts/css-loader.mjs\", pathToFileURL(\"./\"));" ./node_modules/@docusaurus/core/bin/docusaurus.mjs build website
scripts.docs:start: node --require ./scripts/css-hook.cjs --import "data:text/javascript,import { register } from \"node:module\"; import { pathToFileURL } from \"node:url\"; register(\"./scripts/css-loader.mjs\", pathToFileURL(\"./\"));" ./node_modules/@docusaurus/core/bin/docusaurus.mjs start website
scripts.docs:build: node --require ./scripts/css-hook.cjs --import "data:text/javascript,import { register } from \"node:module\"; import { pathToFileURL } from \"node:url\"; register(\"./scripts/css-loader.mjs\", pathToFileURL(\"./\"));" ./node_modules/@docusaurus/core/bin/docusaurus.mjs build website
